requirements.title: record external runtime outcome evidence
requirements.acceptance_boundary: covered only when provider outcome evidence resolves approval, reproduction, rollback, target, session, evidence, verification, and not-proven boundaries

requirements.title: record learning-loop update from usable outcome evidence
requirements.acceptance_boundary: covered only when provider learning-loop update resolves linked outcome evidence and records a non-blocked decision plus next action

forecast.forecast_boundary: forecast is release governance evidence, not delivery certainty or external execution proof

not_proven: Requirement coverage proves trace coverage only; it does not prove semantic truth, external provider execution, operator acceptance, or market value.
